case_title: JOAN SIMON VS. HOWTHVIEW INC. DBA O' REILLY'S HOLY GRAIL

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMON, JOAN DBA RESERVATIONS TONIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT HOWTHVIEW INC. DBA O' REILLY'S HOLY GRAIL
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMON, JOAN DBA RESERVATIONS TONIGHT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWTHVIEW INC. DBA O' REILLY'S HOLY GRAIL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $68.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,568.50, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PRODUCE FULLY EXECUTED CONTRACT OR WRITTEN EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT QUANTUM MERUIT CLAIM. AWARD BASED ON ESTIMATE TIME AND COSTS EXPENDED BY PLAINTIFF LESS MONEY PREVIOUSLY PAID BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $826.23 AS TO DEFENDANT HOWTHVIEW INC. DBA O' REILLY'S HOLY GRAIL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. THE COURT ACCEPTS PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
